mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.entity_type as entityType, e.entity_id as entityId, e.logistics_id as logisticsId, e.shop_type as shopType, e.is_default as isDefault, e.sort, e.create_time as createTime, e.update_time as updateTime, l.name as logisticsName, l.code as logisticsCode, l.platform_id as platformId FROM erp_ship_logistics e LEFT JOIN erp_logistics_company l ON e.logistics_id = l.id WHERE e.entity_type = #{entityType} AND e.entity_id = #{entityId} ORDER BY e.is_default DESC, e.sort ASC, e.create_time DESC
